mapper.select: SELECT account_id AS accountId, name AS name, login_id AS loginId, password AS password, email AS email, phone AS phone, region AS region, role_type AS roleType, status AS status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM accounts WHERE account_id = #{accountId}

SELECT account_id AS accountId, hati_code AS hatiCode, nickname AS nickname, handle AS handle, intro AS intro, is_private AS isPrivate, birth_date AS birthDate, gender AS gender, career_years AS careerYears, account_number AS accountNumber, verification_status AS verificationStatus, verified_at AS verifiedAt FROM user_profile WHERE account_id = #{accountId}

SELECT account_id AS accountId, company_name AS companyName, founded_date AS foundedDate, biz_reg_no AS bizRegNo, verification_status AS verificationStatus, verified_at AS verifiedAt FROM business_profile WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
SELECT url FROM ( SELECT url FROM media_files WHERE ref_id = #{accountId} AND ref_type = 'BANNER' ORDER BY created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT url FROM ( SELECT url FROM media_files WHERE ref_id = #{accountId} AND ref_type = 'PROFILE' ORDER BY created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE dst_account_id = #{accountId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE src_account_id = #{accountId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trainer_booking WHERE trainer_account_id = #{accountId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_profile WHERE nickname = #{nickname} AND handle = #{handle}
mapper.update: UPDATE accounts SET email=#{email}, phone=#{phone}, region=#{region} WHERE account_id=#{accountId}
UPDATE user_profile SET nickname=#{nickname}, handle=#{handle}, intro=#{intro} WHERE account_id=#{accountId}
mapper.select: SELECT product_id AS productId, sport_id AS sportId, total_count AS totalCount, price AS price, base_fee AS baseFee FROM trainer_pass_product WHERE account_id=#{accountId}
mapper.update: UPDATE trainer_pass_product SET price=#{price} WHERE product_id=#{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trainer_pass_product (account_id, sport_id, total_count, price, base_fee) VALUES (#{trainerAccountId}, #{sportId}, #{totalCount}, #{price}, #{baseFee})
mapper.select: SELECT product_id AS productId, sport_id AS sportId, total_count AS totalCount, price AS price, base_fee AS baseFee FROM trainer_pass_product WHERE account_id=#{accountId} AND total_count=1
